description: Vehicle / mech — first wave. Subject IDs match this domain's lane id_patterns (ext_, cockpit_, component_, schematic_) so `sdlab generate` will route each candidate into the correct lane instead of default_lane.

defaults.negative: photorealistic, photograph, 3d render, smooth CG, sharp photo detail

subjects.prompt: oil painting, visible brushstrokes, [DESCRIBE YOUR VEHICLE — hull design, body panels, overall form language], painterly concept art, canvas grain
oil painting, visible brushstrokes, [DESCRIBE YOUR COCKPIT — bridge layout, cabin instruments, pilot seating], painterly concept art, canvas grain
oil painting, visible brushstrokes, [DESCRIBE A COMPONENT — engine, weapon, thruster, subsystem detail], painterly concept art, canvas grain
oil painting, visible brushstrokes, [DESCRIBE YOUR SCHEMATIC — technical diagram, orthographic breakdown, cross-section], painterly concept art, canvas grain
